title: Home row: real words
description: Build short words from home row keys only
text: ask sad lad fall sass lass dad fad jak lad dad fall sass ask
tips: Real words from just home row — you can already write!
Spaces with thumb — keep it light

character_tips.anna: Real words already, just from home row. Your fingers know the pattern.
character_tips.maxim: Eight keys, dozens of words. The keyboard rewards efficiency.
